sys_script_client.description:
This script will control selecting the suspense date field and validate that the date selected is in the future. 2.8.0 | 2022-08-12 | raj | DFCT0011027 - DHS S&T - Warning message on suspense date when selecting an external OU and empty external suspense date 2.6 STRY0091972 - "On Change" of a valid "Suspense date" on the top task with a sub task the "Suspense date error message" is displayed.
v2.5.15: STRY0077855 - Information message on Parent Task's Suspense Date Field - Subtask's Suspense Date is after Parent Task's Suspense Date STRY0077847 - Information message on Subtask's Suspense Date field - Subtask's Suspense Date is after Parent Task's Suspense Date
sys_script_client.messages: Suspense Date AFTER External Due Date Subtask Suspense Date AFTER Parent Task Suspense Date A Subtask has a Suspense Date AFter this Task External Due Date is AFTER the Suspense Date Portal Toast A Subtask has a Suspense Date After the Suspense Date on this Task Platform Toast A Subtask has a Suspense Date After the Suspense Date on this Task
sys_script_client.name: Task - OnChange Suspense Date
